_deploy: Bump latest + appVersion here, BUNDLED_* in surveillance-travel-calculator.html, activeCacheName in service-worker.js — every deploy.
highlights: Settings stays on top after update; Software Update up-to-date screen no longer hidden behind Calculator tab.

v169.intro: Build v169 — post-update screen stays visible.

sections.heading: Fixes
items: Settings overlay now stacks above the tab bar (was behind Calculator at z-index 600).
Post-update flow runs before the tab bar initializes; load handler no longer replaces up-to-date with another update check.
Deploy surveillance-travel-calculator.html, assets/covert-camera.js, service-worker.js, release-notes.json (v169).

sections.heading: Fixes
items: After Restarting Toolbox, app opens Settings → Software Update instead of dropping you on Calculator.
Post-update flags are kept until that screen is shown (survives PWA reload).
Deploy surveillance-travel-calculator.html, assets/covert-camera.js, service-worker.js, release-notes.json (v168).

sections.heading: Fixes
items: Stopped treating bundled/server latest as the build already running in the service worker.
Opening the app after a deploy should show Update ready when the offline pack is still older.
Deploy surveillance-travel-calculator.html, assets/covert-camera.js, service-worker.js, release-notes.json (v167).

sections.heading: Fixes
items: Fixed bug that treated a valid newer waiting worker as stale when it matched the server latest build.
Red badge, Update Now, Restarting Toolbox, and post-update Software Update screen work again.
Deploy surveillance-travel-calculator.html, assets/covert-camera.js, service-worker.js, release-notes.json (v166).

sections.heading: Fixes
items: Reverted over-strict update checks that hid badges and skipped Restarting Toolbox.
Update Now again runs full install + reload + Settings → Software Update up-to-date.
Stale same-version waiting workers no longer show a fake update.
Deploy surveillance-travel-calculator.html, service-worker.js, release-notes.json (v165).

sections.heading: Fixes
items: Update Now no longer fakes a restart when you are already on the latest build.
Shows Restarting Toolbox and reload only when the waiting worker is a newer build.
Deploy surveillance-travel-calculator.html, service-worker.js, release-notes.json (v164).

sections.heading: Fixes
items: Update Now shows Restarting Toolbox before reload (PWA-safe).
After reload opens Settings → Software Update with up-to-date (localStorage + URL flag survives reload).
Update badge shows again when a real update is ready.
Deploy surveillance-travel-calculator.html, service-worker.js, release-notes.json (v163).

v162.intro: Build v162 — false update ready fix.

sections.heading: Fixes
items: Clears stale update badge when installed build matches v162 (no phantom update on current version).
Ignores same-version waiting service workers and old session flags.
Deploy surveillance-travel-calculator.html, service-worker.js, release-notes.json (v162).

sections.heading: Fixes
items: After Update Now, reload opens Settings → Software Update with the up-to-date screen.
Update badges clear after install; ready badges still show when a download is waiting.
Single startup update handler (no duplicate registration paths).
Deploy surveillance-travel-calculator.html, service-worker.js, release-notes.json (v161).

v160.intro: Build v160 — tab policy cache fix.

sections.heading: Fixes
items: Removed bug where old localStorage re-enabled Hotels/Requests after the tab bar initialized.
Inline tab script still runs first; verify html[data-tabs-core="1"] in DevTools on v160.
Deploy surveillance-travel-calculator.html and service-worker.js (v160).

sections.heading: Fixes
items: Inline tab bar runs before the main script so taps and panel hiding always work.
Hotels and Requests default off (matches tab-policy.json) even if fetch fails.
Main script upgrades policy when tab-policy.json loads.
Deploy surveillance-travel-calculator.html, service-worker.js, release-notes.json (v159).

sections.heading: Fixes
items: Tab bar sits above camera overlay (z-index) so taps always register.
Tab policy only greys out buttons; panel switching uses one code path.
Document-level click handler on the tab bar (reliable on mobile).
Camera tab opens Saved clips until you tap Open camera.
Deploy surveillance-travel-calculator.html, assets/covert-camera.js, service-worker.js, release-notes.json (v158).

sections.heading: Fixes
items: Camera tab opens Saved clips (not fullscreen) until you tap Open camera — tab bar stays usable.
Removed shell reset that was fighting camera and tab policy on every load.
Single app bootstrap: tabs, tab-policy.json, then updates (no double-fetch race).
Post-update reload no longer blocks update badges.
Deploy surveillance-travel-calculator.html, assets/covert-camera.js, service-worker.js, release-notes.json (v157).

v156.intro: Build v156 — stable update flow and tabs restored.

sections.heading: Fixes
items: Reverted experimental post-update and bootstrap changes (v150–v155) to the simpler flow that worked before.
Tab bar initializes immediately; camera no longer auto-fullscreens on open.
suppressUpdatePromptOnLoad clears after reload so update badges work again.
Deploy surveillance-travel-calculator.html, assets/covert-camera.js, service-worker.js, release-notes.json (v156).

v155.intro: Build v155 — Software Update and badges restored.

sections.heading: Fixes
items: Red update badge on menu and Settings again when a build is ready (app icon badge uses Badging API even if notifications are off in Toolbox).
After Update Now, reload opens Settings → Software Update with the up-to-date screen.
Removed flags that were permanently blocking update detection after reload.
Deploy surveillance-travel-calculator.html, assets/covert-camera.js, service-worker.js, release-notes.json (v155).

v154.intro: Build v154 — tab bar works again.

sections.heading: Fixes
items: Opening the app no longer auto-starts fullscreen camera (which hid the tab bar and blocked taps).
Tab policy refresh no longer shows every tab panel at once.
Stuck camera or settings overlay cleared on load.
Deploy surveillance-travel-calculator.html, assets/covert-camera.js, service-worker.js, release-notes.json (v154).

v153.intro: Build v153 — tabs, badges, and update flow restored.

sections.heading: Fixes
items: Tab bar initializes immediately again (no waiting on network).
Red update badge on menu, Settings, and app icon works when an update is ready.
Post-update reload no longer leaves update detection permanently disabled.
Deploy surveillance-travel-calculator.html, assets/covert-camera.js, service-worker.js, release-notes.json (v153).

v152.intro: Build v152 — tab bar works after update.

sections.heading: Fixes
items: Tab bar always initializes after an update reload (clicks work again).
Remote tab policy again greys out Hotels/Requests when disabled.
Deploy surveillance-travel-calculator.html, assets/covert-camera.js, service-worker.js, release-notes.json (v152).

v151.intro: Build v151 — post-update Settings flow (second fix).

sections.heading: Fixes
items: Stopped a second tab-policy fetch from resetting to Calculator after an update reload.
Post-update markers survive reload (URL, session, and local storage) so Software Update opens with the up-to-date screen.
Deploy surveillance-travel-calculator.html, assets/covert-camera.js, service-worker.js, release-notes.json (v151).

v150.intro: Build v150 — post-update Settings flow restored.

sections.heading: Fixes
items: After installing an update, the app again opens Settings → Software Update with the up-to-date screen (not Calculator).
Deploy surveillance-travel-calculator.html, assets/covert-camera.js, service-worker.js, release-notes.json (v150).

v149.intro: Build v149 — tab bar touch fix after camera.

sections.heading: Fixes
items: Leaving camera or Saved clips no longer leaves an invisible layer blocking tab taps.
Camera fullscreen only while recording view is active; tab bar works on Saved clips and other tabs.
Deploy surveillance-travel-calculator.html, assets/covert-camera.js, service-worker.js, release-notes.json (v149).

v148.intro: Build v148 — clip addresses, HUD, haptics.

sections.heading: Camera
items: Saved clips show street address (same geocoding as Hotels) — not raw GPS numbers.
Duration, date, and address use the same grey style as file size.
Recording / Stopped text moved to top in white.
Stronger vibration on each covert tap (enable Haptic feedback in Settings → Personalization).
Deploy surveillance-travel-calculator.html, assets/covert-camera.js, service-worker.js, release-notes.json (v148).

v147.intro: Build v147 — Saved clips list improvements.

sections.heading: Camera
items: Newest clips appear at the top of Saved clips.
Each clip shows duration, date/time, and location (GPS) in grey under the file size.
Allow Location for Toolbox so clips can store coordinates when recording.
Deploy surveillance-travel-calculator.html, assets/covert-camera.js, service-worker.js, release-notes.json (v147).

v146.intro: Build v146 — landscape lock for covert recording.

sections.heading: Camera
items: Screen locks to landscape while camera is open and when recording starts.
Rear camera requests 1920×1080 (16:9) and corrects portrait stream when possible.
Deploy surveillance-travel-calculator.html, assets/covert-camera.js, service-worker.js, release-notes.json (v146).

v145.intro: Build v145 — Camera clips library on double swipe up.

sections.heading: Camera
items: Swipe up twice (after stop) — Saved clips screen with thumbnails, View, Select all, Send to OneDrive, Delete selected.
Swipe up once — live preview. Open camera — return to black screen recording.
Deploy surveillance-travel-calculator.html, assets/covert-camera.js, service-worker.js, release-notes.json (v145).

v144.intro: Build v144 — full deploy package (camera + version sync).

sections.heading: Deploy (required every update)
items: Upload together: surveillance-travel-calculator.html, assets/covert-camera.js, service-worker.js, release-notes.json.
Then on phone: Settings → Software Update → Update.
Camera: swipe up = preview; swipe up twice after stop = close camera; tab bar returns; Open camera to start again.

v143.intro: Build v143 — camera swipe gestures corrected.

sections.heading: Camera
items: Swipe up once — live preview. Swipe down — hide preview.
Swipe up twice (when not recording) — close camera, tab bar returns, Open camera on Camera tab.
Deploy surveillance-travel-calculator.html, assets/covert-camera.js, service-worker.js, release-notes.json (v143).

v142.intro: Build v142 — covert camera UI and storage clarity.

sections.heading: Camera
items: Tab bar hidden on black screen; camera fills the display.
Two swipes up for live preview; swipe down to hide.
Only brief Recording / Stopped labels (small dark grey).
Clips stay in Toolbox (not Gallery) — export via Settings → Camera → Upload clips.
Deploy surveillance-travel-calculator.html, assets/covert-camera.js, service-worker.js, release-notes.json (v142).

v141.intro: Build v141 — Android camera permission popup on first tap.

sections.heading: Camera
items: Fixed early Permission denied with no Android popup (camera is requested before microphone).
Clearer message when permissions were blocked earlier and must be reset in Chrome or Android Settings.
Deploy surveillance-travel-calculator.html, assets/covert-camera.js, service-worker.js, release-notes.json (v141).

v140.intro: Build v140 — Allow camera access works on Android.

sections.heading: Camera
items: Allow camera access now triggers getUserMedia from your tap (required on Android).
Progressive camera constraints if 1080p rear camera is not available.
Red error text on the permission screen when something blocks access.
Deploy surveillance-travel-calculator.html, assets/covert-camera.js, service-worker.js, release-notes.json (v140).

v139.intro: Build v139 — version label fix + camera permission button.

sections.heading: Fixes
items: Settings → Software Update and Install now show Version 3.5.8 separately from build v139 (no more v138 as the app version).
Allow camera access button requests permission on tap (required on Android).
Deploy surveillance-travel-calculator.html, assets/covert-camera.js, service-worker.js, release-notes.json (v139).

v138.intro: Build v138 — full-screen covert camera + permission on tab open.

sections.heading: Camera
items: Camera tab is full-screen black (header hidden); clips/upload live under Settings → Camera.
Opening Camera tab prompts for camera and microphone; Allow button if blocked.
Deploy surveillance-travel-calculator.html, assets/covert-camera.js, service-worker.js, release-notes.json (v138).

v137.intro: Build v137 — Covert Camera tab (first release).

sections.heading: Camera
items: Camera tab: rear camera, landscape 1080p, black screen while recording.
3 taps to start/stop · swipe up for preview · swipe down to hide · haptics on taps.
Clips saved as 00000, 00001, … in Toolbox storage on the device.
Upload clips button (Share sheet → OneDrive) — manual only.
Settings → Camera for permissions, wake lock, max length, clear clips.
Enable Camera tab in Developer or tab-policy.json when ready to roll out.
Deploy surveillance-travel-calculator.html, assets/covert-camera.js, service-worker.js, release-notes.json (v137).

v136.intro: Build v136 — version 3.5.5 synced with deploy.

sections.heading: Release
items: App version is now 3.5.5 (was stuck on 3.5.4 while only the build number changed).
Settings and update screens show Version 3.5.5 · v136 without repeating the build twice.
Each deploy: bump latest + appVersion in release-notes.json, BUNDLED_* in surveillance-travel-calculator.html, and activeCacheName in service-worker.js together.
Deploy surveillance-travel-calculator.html, service-worker.js, and release-notes.json (v136).

v135.intro: Build v135 — install no longer opens browser tab after accept.

sections.heading: Install
items: Removed auto-redirect to the calculator in Chrome after you accept Install — the installed app stays on your home screen.
When install finishes, the page tells you to open Toolbox from your home screen or app drawer.
Deploy index.html, surveillance-travel-calculator.html, service-worker.js, and release-notes.json (v135).

v134.intro: Build v134 — Settings Install App screen.

sections.heading: Install
items: Renamed Install Icon to Install App in Settings → How to Use.
Install App page has Install on Android / Windows / Mac button that triggers the native install prompt when Chrome or Edge is ready.
Removed install-page link list; manual fallback is browser menu → Install app.
Deploy index.html, surveillance-travel-calculator.html, service-worker.js, and release-notes.json (v134).

v133.intro: Build v133 — Android install page fixes.

sections.heading: Install
items: Android phones (including after scanning the QR with the camera) are detected correctly — no more Install on Windows on your phone.
Removed Open on Windows or Mac button from the install page.
Install on Android and install steps show immediately instead of Preparing install… on page load.
Deploy index.html, surveillance-travel-calculator.html, service-worker.js, and release-notes.json (v133).

v132.intro: Build v132 — install page detects your device.

sections.heading: Install
items: Install button shows Install on Android, Install on Windows, Install on Mac, etc., based on where you open the link.
Subtitle on the install page confirms detected device (e.g. You’re on Windows).
Deploy index.html, surveillance-travel-calculator.html, service-worker.js, and release-notes.json (v132).

v131.intro: Build v131 — install page wording (phone + computer).

sections.heading: Install
items: Buttons: Install on phone / Install on computer, Use in browser, Open on computer (from a phone).
Desktop Chrome and Edge can install Toolbox as an app, not only Android.
Deploy index.html, surveillance-travel-calculator.html, service-worker.js, and release-notes.json (v131).

v130.intro: Build v130 — install page QR layout.

sections.heading: Install
items: QR white background is sized to the code instead of stretching full width.
Deploy index.html, service-worker.js, and release-notes.json (v130).

v129.intro: Build v129 — version labels show deploy build (v129) in Software Update and What's New.

sections.heading: Updates
items: Update card title uses build v129 (each deploy bumps v130, v131, …).
Product version stays 3.5.4 until a major release; build number is what changes each upload.
Deploy surveillance-travel-calculator.html, service-worker.js, and release-notes.json (v129).

sections.heading: Install
items: Install page QR draws locally when possible; otherwise shows a backup QR image so the white box is never empty.
Deploy index.html, service-worker.js, and release-notes.json (v128).

v127.intro: Build v127 — launch after PWA install.

sections.heading: Install
items: After you accept Install on Android, the app opens Toolbox automatically when Chrome allows it.

v126.intro: Build v126 — desktop browser picker on install page.

items: Install page adds Open on Desktop — choose Firefox, Chrome, or Edge to open Toolbox.

v125.intro: Build v125 — Android install prompt fix.

sections.heading: Install
items: Install page registers the service worker immediately and shows Install when Chrome is ready.
Tapping Install runs the native prompt; if not ready yet, opens the app with an Install Toolbox bar.

sections.heading: Install
items: Install page shows QR only (no URL text under the code); Android Chrome only.

sections.heading: Install
items: Install page (index.html) is for Android Chrome only; iPhone visitors see an Android-only message.
Settings → Install Icon guide updated for Android only.

sections.heading: Install
items: Install page always shows Install on this phone; tap for steps when the browser does not offer a one-tap install.

Deploy index.html, surveillance-travel-calculator.html, service-worker.js, and release-notes.json (v122).

v121.intro: Investigator Toolbox 3.5.4 — install page for company rollout.

Requests and Camera show a clear coming-soon card; disabled tabs stay hidden via tab policy.

sections.heading: UI
items: Primary: Calculate, Search Hotels, Send Email, Update Now. Secondary: Clear, Maps, Copy. Tertiary text: Check Again.
One-way/Round trip and menus use bordered selection, not solid black fill. Settings menu icon stays neutral when pressed.

v109.intro: Investigator Toolbox 3.5.4 — personalization and settings UI polish.

items: Default tab on open is Last Used; tab labels default to Always Show Labels.

sections.heading: Personalization
items: Default tab on open: Calculator, Last used, Hotels, Requests, or Camera.
Layout: Comfortable or Compact spacing.
Tab bar: Auto (icons only on narrow screens) or Always show labels.
Reduce motion: Off, System, or On; optional haptic feedback on key actions.

sections.heading: Settings
items: Each settings page shows the same icon as its menu row next to the title.

sections.heading: Settings
items: New Location & Notifications screen: allow or block location and notifications in Toolbox (used by Hotel Finder now; Camera and Requests later).

v105.intro: Investigator Toolbox 3.5.4 — home screen update badge fix.

items: When an update is ready: Android shows icon badge via a Toolbox update notification (allow Notifications); iPhone/Windows use Badging API with number 1 when installed and notifications allowed.

v90.intro: Investigator Toolbox 3.5.4 — fix location reset after Allow.

sections.heading: Hotel Finder
items: Recognizes British Columbia and other full province names from GPS (not only BC).
Search can request GPS for you; failed lookup shows Tap to retry instead of Select.
Deploy surveillance-travel-calculator.html and service-worker.js (v90).

sections.heading: Hotel Finder
items: Location button and hotel cards show street + city + province (e.g. 123 Main St, Kelowna, BC) or city + province — never raw lat/lng.
Deploy surveillance-travel-calculator.html and service-worker.js (v89).

v88.intro: Investigator Toolbox 3.5.4 — show where you searched from.

sections.heading: Hotel Finder
items: After GPS, the location button shows your city and province (e.g. Kelowna, BC), not a generic label.
Hotel cards: 7.8 km · 9 min from Kelowna, BC · CAD 104/night incl. tax — distance is from your site.
Deploy surveillance-travel-calculator.html and service-worker.js (v88).

v86.intro: Investigator Toolbox 3.5.4 — stay total + tax line = nightly price.

sections.heading: Hotel Finder
items: Reads CAD 398 stay + CAD 52 tax as (398+52)÷nights — e.g. 225/night for 2 nights.
Deploy booking-worker-71 plus HTML, service-worker, release-notes (v86).

v85.intro: Investigator Toolbox 3.5.4 — fix displayed nightly price on hotel cards.

sections.heading: Hotel Finder
items: Worker sends perNightInclTax; app no longer re-parses tax-only text as the room rate.
Example: CAD 398 + 52 tax for 2 nights → 225/night on card (over $200 = hidden).
Deploy booking-worker-70 plus HTML, service-worker, and release-notes (v85).

sections.heading: Hotel Finder
items: One Search = one async scrape (~40 credits on your plan). Worker polling does not add credits.
Deploy booking-worker-69 plus HTML, service-worker, and release-notes (v84).

v83.intro: Investigator Toolbox 3.5.4 — fix nightly price and budget filter.

sections.heading: Hotel Finder
items: 2-night example: CAD 398 + 52 tax → 225/night incl. tax (not 25–27 from tax-only or wrong nights).
Over $200/night incl. tax: hotel hidden, not listed.
Deploy booking-worker-68 plus HTML, service-worker, and release-notes (v83).

v82.intro: Investigator Toolbox 3.5.4 — fix multi-night price and remove audit screen.

sections.heading: Hotel Finder
items: 3+ night searches: card prices treated as stay total unless labeled per night (e.g. CA$277 for 3 nights → ~92/night, not 277).
Removed the over-budget “Rates from this search” list; short status message only.
Deploy booking-worker-68 plus HTML and service-worker (v82).

v81.intro: Investigator Toolbox 3.5.4 — hardened filters for edge cases.

sections.heading: Hotel Finder
items: Shared filter rules in cloudflare/booking-filters.js (run build-booking-worker.mjs after edits).
Amenity filters: card proof when scraped; trust Booking URL only when the card has no amenity data.
Hotels & motels: same search page every time; chains + URL slug detection.
Deploy booking-worker-65 plus HTML and service-worker (v81).

v80.intro: Investigator Toolbox 3.5.4 — fix Hotels & motels filter (same search results).

sections.heading: Hotel Finder
items: Hotels & motels no longer changes the Booking URL (was replacing SureStay with unrelated over-budget listings).
Filter runs on the same scrape client-side; Best Western / SureStay and similar chains recognized.
Toggle filters after Search refilters cached results — no extra ScraperAPI charge.
Deploy booking-worker-64 plus HTML and service-worker (v80).

v78.intro: Investigator Toolbox 3.5.4 — Canada-only hotels; fix border and budget fallback.

sections.heading: Hotel Finder
items: Drops US/MX Booking listings (border GPS no longer shows American hotels).
Budget filter requires a real all-in nightly rate — no $0 or missing-tax false matches.
Clearer errors when hotels are over $200/night or lack a scraped price.
Deploy booking-worker-63 plus the three GitHub files; hard-refresh; new Search.

v77.intro: Investigator Toolbox 3.5.4 — all-in nightly price and budget cap (all provinces).

sections.heading: Hotel Finder
items: Worker 62: per-night vs total-stay price fix; tax add-on math for $200/night incl. tax cap.
Skips budget match when Booking shows +tax without a dollar amount (no false under-$200).
Same logic for every province/territory (AB–YT); cap from maxNightlyByProvince.
Deploy booking-worker-62 on Cloudflare plus the three GitHub files; hard-refresh; new Search.

v76.intro: Investigator Toolbox 3.5.4 — fix nightly price calculation.

sections.heading: Hotel Finder
items: Worker 61 distinguishes per-night card rates from total-stay JSON (no double-divide).
Results and email draft use the same nightly math as cloudflare/booking-price.js.
After editing booking-price.js run: node scripts/build-booking-worker.mjs then deploy worker.
Deploy booking-worker-61 plus the three GitHub files; hard-refresh and run a new Search.

v75.intro: Investigator Toolbox 3.5.3 — restore Booking nightly prices.

sections.heading: Hotel Finder
items: Worker 60 extracts prices from cards and embedded JSON (merge when cards lack rates).
Results and email draft show per-night CAD again when Booking returns a price.
Deploy booking-worker-60 plus the three GitHub files.

v74.intro: Investigator Toolbox 3.5.2 — reject hotel searches with no location/dates.

sections.heading: Hotel Finder
items: Worker 59 refuses searches missing GPS, destination, or dates (no ScraperAPI charge).
App always sends lat, lng, chkin, chkout on Search.
Deploy booking-worker-59 plus the three GitHub files.

v73.intro: Investigator Toolbox 3.5.1 — fix Booking property deep links.

sections.heading: Hotel Finder
items: Open on Booking.com uses each hotel’s property URL with your dates (not the area search page).
Worker 58 improves property link extraction from search results.
Deploy booking-worker-58 plus the three GitHub files.

v72.intro: Investigator Toolbox 3.5.0 — Hotel search UX and amenity filters.

sections.heading: Hotel Finder
items: Breakfast, parking, cancellation, and hotels-only use Booking.com nflt filters (worker 57).
Search scrolls to progress; removed “automated 4 min” and booking-confirm hint text.
Deploy booking-worker-57 plus the three GitHub files (blocks search if worker too old).

v71.intro: Investigator Toolbox 3.4.9 — Hotels & motels only filter fix.

sections.heading: Hotel Finder
items: Hotels & motels only uses a strict whitelist (excludes B&B, guest house, apartment, etc.).
Worker 55 improves property-type parsing from Booking.com cards.
Deploy booking-worker-55 on Cloudflare plus the three GitHub files.

v70.intro: Investigator Toolbox 3.4.8 — Booking search uses ScraperAPI Async (worker 53).

sections.heading: Hotel Finder
items: Searches run via ScraperAPI Async (retries until success or timeout) — fixes Cloudflare 30s cap.
App polls automatically; one Search tap, no manual Booking.com step.
Deploy booking-worker-54 on Cloudflare (fixes async API key bug in v53).

sections.heading: Hotel Finder
items: Cloudflare worker booking-worker-52: removed wait_for_selector (main cause of 500 / 30s failures).
No second ScraperAPI call on failure — one search, one charge attempt.
Clearer errors when ScraperAPI returns “Request failed after automatic retries”.
Deploy cloudflare/booking-worker.js AND the three GitHub files together.

v68.intro: Investigator Toolbox 3.4.6 — Hotel search speed UX.

sections.heading: Hotel Finder
items: One steady status line while Booking loads (no rotating “nearly there” text).
No automatic second search on timeout — saves time and ScraperAPI credits.
Results show as soon as Booking responds.

v67.intro: Investigator Toolbox 3.4.5 — Filter guard + plural type fix.

sections.heading: Hotel Finder
items: With any filter on, Search refuses to run until Cloudflare worker booking-worker-51+ passes ?filterSelfTest=1 (no Scraper credits).
Fixed Hotels vs Apartments matching on Booking property types.
Deploy HTML + cloudflare/booking-worker.js together.

v66.intro: Investigator Toolbox 3.4.4 — Hotel Finder filters fixed.

sections.heading: Hotel Finder
items: All toggles now filter search results using data parsed from each Booking.com listing card.
Deploy booking-worker.js to Cloudflare (booking-worker-51) — HTML alone is not enough.
If no results match, you will see which filters excluded everything.

v65.intro: Investigator Toolbox 3.4.3 — Hotel Finder UX fixes.

sections.heading: Hotel Finder
items: Choosing Current Location no longer scrolls the page.
Hotels & motels only updates results from your last search without a new ScraperAPI call.
Stronger filter for apartments and similar listings; breakfast/parking/cancellation still require checking Booking links.

v64.intro: Investigator Toolbox 3.4.2 — Hotel Finder Current Location picker.

sections.heading: Hotel Finder
items: Current Location dropdown — selecting it prompts for location permission (like other apps).
Search Hotels uses the location you already allowed — no permission prompt on search.
Removed the on-site banner. Calculator address is still not used for hotel search.

v63.intro: Investigator Toolbox 3.4.1 — Hotel Finder GPS-only fix.

sections.heading: Hotel Finder
items: Search uses your phone GPS only — must be at the surveillance location.
Tap Search Hotels; your browser will ask for location permission.
Calculator event address is not used. Only coordinates and nearest city go to search.
Open the app via https (GitHub Pages or installed PWA), not a file:// link.

v62.intro: Investigator Toolbox 3.4.0 — Hotel Finder location (superseded by v63 GPS-only).

sections.heading: Hotel Finder
items: Replaced in v3.4.1 with GPS-only search.

sections.heading: Tab locks
items: Edit tab-policy.json on GitHub (false = locked). Phones load it on open.

sections.heading: Fixes
items: tab-policy.json on GitHub is the primary source for tab locks.
Cloudflare Worker no longer forces all tabs on when KV is not set up.

sections.heading: Developer
items: Apply for all investigators pushes tab locks to the server.
Every phone fetches policy on open, resume, and after Software Update.

v58.intro: Investigator Toolbox 3.3.6 — Update detection and tab lock fixes.

sections.heading: Fixes
items: Software Update detects when release-notes.json is newer than the installed build.
Tab locks grey out tabs, block taps, and return you to Calculator if a locked tab was open.

v57.intro: Investigator Toolbox 3.3.5 — Settings titles and tab locks.

sections.heading: Settings
items: All drill-down titles use the same size as Toolbox Settings.
Turn off Allow access switches to lock Hotels, Requests, or Camera on this device.

v56.intro: Investigator Toolbox 3.3.4 — Viewport and post-update UX fix.

sections.heading: Fixes
items: App shell height follows the real visible screen so the tab bar is not cut off.
Completing an update reopens Settings → Software Update with the up-to-date screen.

v55.intro: Investigator Toolbox 3.3.3 — Mobile tab bar and header polish.

sections.heading: Layout
items: Tab bar uses small viewport height so it is not clipped on Android after updates.
Tab icons are vertically centered; header and tab bar borders removed for a seamless look.

v54.intro: Investigator Toolbox 3.3.2 — Apple-style software update UI.

sections.heading: Settings
items: Software Update matches iOS layout: app icon, version, summary, Update Now.
Progress bar animates gradually during download and install.
Toolbox is up to date screen with More Details → Version Details slide-in.

sections.heading: Settings
items: Menu opens a full-height settings sheet (same width as the app) that slides up from the bottom.
App Settings → Personalization: System / Light / Dark and Standard / Large font toggles.
How to Use guides and Developer tab controls use the same bubbled list + slide navigation.

v52.intro: Investigator Toolbox 3.3.0 — Settings, Developer tab control, layout.

sections.heading: Settings
items: Menu opens a full Settings window with General (appearance, font size, updates) and How to Use (Calculator, Hotels, Camera, Install icon).
Software update banners and Check for updates live under Settings → Software update.
Developer: enter password to enable/disable Hotels, Requests, and Camera tabs for users.

sections.heading: Hotel Finder
items: Removed Cloudflare team access code gate — hotel search works without unlock panel.
Redeploy booking-worker-49 on Cloudflare (removes BOOKING_ACCESS_TOKEN requirement).

sections.heading: Layout
items: App shell uses CSS grid (header, scrollable content, tab bar) at 100dvh inside a 680px column.
Bottom tab bar stays visible on desktop and installed PWA.

v51.intro: Investigator Toolbox 3.2.2 — Tab bar width and layout.

sections.heading: Layout
items: Bottom tabs stay inside the same 680px-wide app column as the rest of the UI on desktop.
Phone/PWA: header + scroll area + tab bar in one flex column (no viewport-wide tab bar).

v50.intro: Investigator Toolbox 3.2.1 — Tab bar layout fix.

sections.heading: Layout
items: Bottom tab bar (Calculator, Hotels, Requests, Camera) stays visible on desktop and installed PWA.
App shell uses flex + pinned tab bar instead of fragile viewport grid sizing.

v49.intro: Investigator Toolbox 3.2.0 — Hotel Finder access lock.

sections.heading: Hotel Finder
items: Unlock panel on Hotel tab; code verified by Cloudflare Worker (not stored in GitHub).
Set BOOKING_ACCESS_TOKEN on the booking-lookup Worker; share code with your team only.
Optional BOOKING_DAILY_LIMIT_PER_IP to cap searches per network per day.

v48.intro: Investigator Toolbox 3.1.9 — Hotel Finder search status messages.

sections.heading: Hotel Finder
items: While searching, status text cycles through mapping, Booking.com, amenities you toggled, and almost-done lines.
Free parking/breakfast toggles appear in messages; confirm details on each Booking link.
Number of matches shown (1–8) filters results after one scrape — same API credits either way.

v47.intro: Investigator Toolbox 3.1.8 — Hotel Finder slow-search retry.

sections.heading: Hotel Finder
items: If Booking.com hits the 30s server limit, the app automatically runs one more search.
Worker uses wait_for_selector on hotel cards to finish sooner when possible.
Desktop: hard-refresh after upload so footer shows v3.1.8.

v46.intro: Investigator Toolbox 3.1.7 — Clearer Hotel Finder errors and Worker diagnostics.

sections.heading: Hotel Finder
items: Failed searches report workerVersion (booking-worker-46) or tell you to redeploy Cloudflare.
Protected errors explain premium render credits; parking/breakfast are not sent to Booking.
Worker ?health=1 and ?preview=1 help verify deploy without a full search.

v45.intro: Investigator Toolbox 3.1.6 — Hotel search matches working Worker test.

sections.heading: Hotel Finder
items: Search now uses city/area + GPS (e.g. Armstrong, BC, Canada), not the full street line — matches the Worker URL that worked.
Cloudflare Worker ignores amenity filters on Booking.com (app filters results after).
Check JSON for workerVersion booking-worker-45 to confirm Cloudflare deploy.

v44.intro: Investigator Toolbox 3.1.5 — Hotel Finder app matches working Worker search.

sections.heading: Hotel Finder
items: App no longer sends Booking.com amenity URL filters to the server (those caused ScraperAPI failures while the direct Worker test worked).
Search should match your successful Worker test: Armstrong Inn and nearby hotels.
Hotels & motels only filters out suites/apartments from results; breakfast/parking/cancellation — confirm on the Booking.com link.

v43.intro: Investigator Toolbox 3.1.4 — update banner timing and Booking.com search fix.

sections.heading: Updates
items: After an update, the “up to date” banner shows briefly then slides away in about 5–6 seconds.
Hotel Finder Worker now uses ScraperAPI premium + JavaScript render (fixes HTTP 500 Protected).
Hotel search errors show a short message instead of raw API text.

v42.intro: Investigator Toolbox 3.1.3 — version labels, update banner timing, and Android tab bar.

sections.heading: Updates
items: App version (3.1.3) now appears in the footer, settings menu, update banners, and What's New details.
After installing an update, the success banner stays for 30 seconds and eases out slowly.
Bottom navigation bar sits above the Android gesture area so all tabs stay tappable.

v41.intro: Investigator Toolbox 3.1.2 — update install fix for mobile.

sections.heading: Updates
items: Tapping Update no longer causes a repeating banner or reload loop on Android.
After install, the app restarts once and shows a short “up to date” message.

v40.intro: Investigator Toolbox 3.1.1 — mobile layout and update improvements.

sections.heading: Hotel Finder
items: Hotel tab width on Android now matches the Calculator tab (no content spilling off the right edge).
Amenity filters use a compact layout on phone: label above the switch, single column; two columns on wider screens.

sections.heading: Updates
items: Update banner scrolls inside the main content area so the bottom tab bar stays visible.
After you tap Update, the app clears old cached files and restarts automatically.

v39.intro: Investigator Toolbox 3.1.0 — Hotel Finder powered by Booking.com.

sections.heading: Hotel Finder
items: Searches live Booking.com hotels near the surveillance event (sorted by distance). Works when the app is hosted on GitHub — no local server required for investigators.
Each result shows distance, approximate price per night including taxes and fees, review score, and review count.
Opens the correct Booking.com listing for your check-in and check-out dates.
Only lists hotels at or under the company budget (≤ $200/night incl. tax). If nothing is in range within your chosen distance, the app shows the nearest options beyond that radius.
New Max Distance From Event picker (5, 10, 25, or 50 km).
Amenity toggles: Free breakfast, Free parking, Free cancellation, and Hotels & motels only (excludes vacation rentals and chalets).
Removed duplicate address preview fields; search clears old results when you run a new search.
Status messages scroll into view when something is missing before send (e.g. email not entered).

sections.heading: Email request
items: Reformatted hotel request email (hotel name, rate, Booking.com link, client billed, optional Trackops case number).
Send Email opens Outlook on desktop and the Outlook app on iPhone/Android when available.
Removed investigator name block from the draft; your email is still used for CC.
Admin recipients are configured in the app (Operations Admin, Scheduling Admin).

sections.heading: Other
items: Header subtitle updated to Resources for Investigator.
Hotels Clear Form button matches the calculator styling.

v38.intro: Investigator Toolbox 3.0.0 — initial What's New and update flow.

sections.heading: What's New
items: Clearer in-app update steps: download, install, and up to date messages.
What's New section shows what changed after each update.
Initial Hotel Finder integration.
Improved update testing on your computer before rolling out to the team.
